title: 创建内部(Internal)虚拟交换机
output:
HOST PATH: \\WIN-OMK556K17QL\root\virtualization\v2:Msvm_ComputerSystem.CreationClassName="Msvm_ComputerSystem",Name="WIN-OMK556K17QL"
DefineSystem ReturnValue=4096
Job final state=7
Created switch path: ...Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitch...Name="31ABF2F4-7D14-4FCD-953E-8E7CEF7E0680"
READBACK: ElementName=WMITEST_create_switch Count=1 PortAllocations=1 InternalHostPort=1 ExternalPort=0
CLEANUP DestroySystem rv=4096
POSTCLEAN leftover count=0
ASSERT PASS :: ElementName=WMITEST_create_switch Count=1 PortAllocations=1 InternalHostPort=1 ExternalPort=0
notes: 使用 Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitchManagementService.DefineSystem 创建交换机，签名与创建虚拟机的同名方法一致：DefineSystem(SystemSettings, ResourceSettings[], ReferenceConfiguration)；OUT 参数为 ResultingSystem 与 Job，返回码 0 表示成功、4096 表示异步 Job。

三种交换机的区别取决于 ResourceSettings 数组：Private 不传端口(空数组或 null)；Internal 传 1 个 Msvm_EthernetPortAllocationSettingData，其 HostResource 指向宿主 Msvm_ComputerSystem.__PATH(宿主由此获得一块 vNIC)；External 的 HostResource 指向物理 Msvm_ExternalEthernetPort。
端口的 ResourceSubType 由 provider 自动填为 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Ethernet Connection'，ResourceType=33，无需手动设置。
DefineSystem 走异步路径(返回 4096)时，OUT 参数 ResultingSystem 可能为空，需先用 Wait-Job2 等待 Job 到达 JobState=7(Completed)，再按 ElementName 反查 Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitch 获取 __PATH。
定位宿主 Msvm_ComputerSystem 时，Caption/Description 为本地化字符串，不应按 'Hosting Computer System' 匹配；可靠判据是宿主的 Name 等于 ElementName(计算机名)，而虚拟机的 Name 为 GUID。
验证交换机类型时，不宜依赖 GetRelated('Msvm_InternalEthernetPort')(该关联不稳定)；应枚举交换机 SettingData 下的 Msvm_EthernetPortAllocationSettingData，按 HostResource 是否指向宿主判定 Internal。
清理使用 Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitchManagementService.DestroySystem(switch.__PATH)，同样可能返回 4096 需等待；finally 块按 ElementName 兜底删除，避免异常时残留。
notes_en: The switch is created with Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitchManagementService.DefineSystem, whose signature matches the method of the same name used to create a virtual machine: DefineSystem(SystemSettings, ResourceSettings[], ReferenceConfiguration). Its OUT parameters are ResultingSystem and Job; a return code of 0 indicates success and 4096 indicates an asynchronous job.

The distinction between the three switch types depends on the ResourceSettings array: Private passes no port (empty array or null); Internal passes one Msvm_EthernetPortAllocationSettingData whose HostResource points to the host Msvm_ComputerSystem.__PATH (giving the host a vNIC); External sets HostResource to a physical Msvm_ExternalEthernetPort.
The port's ResourceSubType is automatically filled in by the provider as 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Ethernet Connection' with ResourceType=33, and does not need to be set manually.

When DefineSystem takes the asynchronous path (returning 4096), the OUT parameter ResultingSystem may be empty; use Wait-Job2 to wait for the job to reach JobState=7 (Completed), then look up Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitch by ElementName to obtain the __PATH.

When locating the host Msvm_ComputerSystem, Caption/Description are localized strings and should not be matched against 'Hosting Computer System'; a reliable criterion is that the host's Name equals its ElementName (computer name), whereas a VM's Name is a GUID.

When verifying the switch type, do not rely on GetRelated('Msvm_InternalEthernetPort') (that association is unreliable); instead enumerate the Msvm_EthernetPortAllocationSettingData under the switch's SettingData and determine Internal by whether HostResource points to the host.

Cleanup uses Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitchManagementService.DestroySystem(switch.__PATH), which may likewise return 4096 and require waiting; the finally block removes by ElementName as a fallback to avoid residue on exceptions.
